title: Australians Seeking Lifestyle + Income Opportunity Bali
description:
Job Description

Have you considered turning your hospitality or sales experience into a high-earning role while living in Bali?

We are representing luxury resorts across Ungasan, Uluwatu, Jimbaran, Sanur, and Candidasa seeking Australian professionals ready for a performance-driven, guest-facing executive role.

This is not a backpacker job. This is a structured, commission-based executive position within premium resort environments.

Why This Appeals to Australians

  • Work in Bali while maintaining strong earning potential
  • Engage predominantly with Australian and international guests
  • Lower living costs compared to major Australian cities
  • Structured relocation support provided
  • No cold calling — all sales conducted face-to-face within luxury resorts

What Makes This Different

Many hospitality professionals in Australia earn fixed salaries with capped income growth.

This role offers:

  • Commission-based earning with no ceiling
  • Direct revenue accountability
  • Transparent performance expectations
  • High-end resort working environment
  • A defined career pathway

Who This Suits

  • Experienced hospitality professionals seeking higher income
  • Resort, timeshare, travel, or premium retail sales background
  • Confident communicators comfortable in structured presentations
  • Professionals seeking lifestyle relocation without sacrificing income

Earnings & Structure

  • Commission-based compensation
  • Realistic monthly earning potential based on performance
  • Relocation and onboarding support available
  • Full-time on-site position in Bali

If you are currently in Australia and considering an international move that combines lifestyle with commercial upside, this opportunity warrants a confidential conversation.

Send your CV to:
careers@dreamsalesjobs.com
Subject Line: Australian Candidate – Bali Luxury Role
requirements: Experienced hospitality professionals seeking higher income
Resort, timeshare, travel, or premium retail sales background
Confident communicators comfortable in structured presentations
